blockingIssues.description: `run_started` is emitted in scheduler while run status is still queued, not when heartbeat transitions the run to running.
Issue reopen path updates status to todo but does not emit `issue_status_changed`, leaving status-change event coverage incomplete.
Issue list API contract mismatch: response keeps raw `status` and exposes projection in `projectedStatus`, while contract expects returned `status` to be projection-derived.
Reconciler marks queued runs as orphan candidates; contract and heartbeat behavior indicate orphan closure should target running orphaned runs.
Ghost projection correction hard-sets issue status to `todo` instead of restoring raw status.
Run-vs-issue mismatch reconciliation step described in feature requirements is missing from `reconcile()`.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `.factory/library/testing.md` note documenting cleanup ordering for `control_plane_events` before `companies` in embedded-Postgres tests to avoid FK cleanup failures.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a feature fulfills API assertions (e.g., `/api/issues` status semantics), require at least one route-level test per affected endpoint in addition to service-level tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: projection-service passed service tests while violating VAL-PROJ-030 list response contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit red→green evidence for new tests in worker verification notes (first failing run and subsequent passing run).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: event-log-service transcript did not show explicit red-run evidence despite skill procedure requiring test-first verification.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify projection-status contract explicitly: whether projected status must overwrite `status` in API payloads or be exposed as a separate field, and align validation contract + tests accordingly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: projection-service and reconciliation-service reviews both identified raw-vs-projected status ambiguity (`status` vs `projectedStatus`, and ghost reset to todo vs raw status).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen review guidance that secondary lookups in services must also be company-scoped (not only primary entry queries).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: reconciliation-service review found unscoped secondary lookups despite company-scoping being a core mission invariant.

rejectedObservations.observation: Separate suggestion to update conventions for projected status naming in routes.
